text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Hakodate Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru aims to earn a winner's star
that rivals the star-shaped grounds of Goryokaku
Fort.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She enthusiastically heads off to the track to
make her mark.
